name: ht_sign(M, SK.seed, PK.seed, idx_tree, idx_leaf)
label: Algorithm 12

inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: idx_tree
inputs.description: Index of the XMSS tree at layer 0 to use for signing

inputs.name: idx_leaf
inputs.description: Index of the WOTS+ key within the layer 0 XMSS tree to use for signing

outputs.name: SIG_HT
outputs.description: (h + d * len) * n-byte hypertree signature, sequence of d XMSS signatures

body_raw: SIG_tmp ← xmss_sign(M, SK.seed, idx_leaf, PK.seed, ADRS)
root ← xmss_pkFromSig(idx_leaf, SIG_tmp, M, PK.seed, ADRS)
for j from 1 to d - 1 do
SIG_tmp ← xmss_sign(root, SK.seed, idx_leaf, PK.seed, ADRS)
root ← xmss_pkFromSig(idx_leaf, SIG_tmp, root, PK.seed, ADRS)
